categories.name: Halloween Social Door (in-studio sign-up)
categories.note: $30 each. In-studio sign-ups for the October 31 social, collected at the last two evening classes. See halloween_in_studio_signups.json for the name-level detail. This is the in-studio rail; the Eventbrite advance rail is separate and the two overlap on 6 names.
